title: Track + verify external reuse events
context: M3 requires at least 3 verifiable external reuse events (a bank imported into a third-party platform, merged into an OER repo, cited in a fork, or confirmed in classroom use by a named teacher) with externally verifiable evidence. Self-reported reuse does not count. This task monitors for reuse signals across GitHub forks, platform import records, and teacher communications, and records verified events in the outcome ledger.
objective: Identify, verify, and record at least 3 externally verifiable reuse events for delivered banks in the project's outcome ledger.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 3 verifiable external reuse events identified: each with externally verifiable evidence (platform import record/permalink, merged PR into an OER repo, teacher's written confirmation of classroom use, or fork/citation).
Each event recorded in the outcome ledger with: bank id, event type, evidence URL/permalink, date, and verifier.
Self-reported reuse without external evidence explicitly excluded.
Document committed to the project repo; CC-BY-4.0 licensed; commit DCO signed-off.
resources: quiz-bank-open-bank-014, quiz-bank-open-bank-015, quiz-bank-open-banks-018 (delivered banks to monitor)
output: A committed outcome-ledger supplement recording at least 3 externally verifiable reuse events with evidence.
